name: 鄉下女孩豪門變裝
description: 真千金從鄉下素人裝扮換上高定時裝，視覺上完成『灰姑娘變公主』的轉變。這類場景滿足觀眾的變裝幻想，同時用外在變化象徵身份的回歸。
tags: 身份反差的視覺化呈現——從被嘲笑的鄉下丫頭到驚艷全場的真千金

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Go to the haute couture store and choose your favorite piece to change into. / Watch my beautiful girl transformation! / My daughter / You are so beautiful. / Miss Nancy looks just like you when you were young.
examples.context: 身份反差的視覺化呈現——從被嘲笑的鄉下丫頭到驚艷全場的真千金
